name: Databox Analytics Dashboard API
what_it_does: Databox REST API for KPI analytics dashboard and reporting platform. Enables AI agents to push custom metric data via the Push API, manage connections, retrieve aggregated metrics, and integrate business data into Databox dashboards accessible on web and mobile. Databox connects to 100+ native integrations and supports custom data via API.
use_cases: Pushing custom KPI data from business systems from analytics automation agents
Aggregating cross-platform metrics into unified dashboards from reporting agents
Monitoring business performance in real-time from operations intelligence agents
Automating dashboard creation and metric configuration from BI setup agents
not_for: Custom interactive embedded analytics for end users
best_when: A marketing, sales, or operations team wants AI agents to push custom metrics into Databox dashboards alongside native integrations for unified business performance visibility.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Dashboards may contain business-sensitive or customer-identifiable metrics. Databox stores pushed data on their servers.

auth.notes: Databox Push API uses a token per custom connection as Basic auth username. Each custom connection has its own push token. No OAuth flow required for data pushing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 3 data sources, 3 dashboards, limited metrics history
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter, Professional, and Performer plans scaling data sources, dashboards, and history retention
pricing.notes: Slovenian company. Competitive pricing with generous free tier. Enterprise plan available.

performance.rate_limits: Push API: varies by plan; recommended batching for high-frequency pushes

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — REST Push API with per-connection tokens
Each custom data source has its own push token — manage multiple tokens for multiple sources
Data push is idempotent — same metric/timestamp updates existing value
Historical data push supported but limited by plan's history retention window
No webhooks — push-only model from your side
Slovenian company — EU-first data residency; GDPR and ISO27001 compliant
agent_readiness.security_notes: Per-connection push tokens. GDPR, ISO27001. EU-first (Slovenian company). Business KPI data — confidential.

security_score_components.security_notes: Per-connection push tokens. GDPR, ISO27001. EU-first (Slovenian). Business metrics data is confidential.
